Uses of Interface
recoder.abstraction.ClassTypeContainer

Packages that use ClassTypeContainer
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.bytecode
This package contains classes that cover information derived from Java byte code.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
